/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wpedantic -Wextra -Weffc++ -Werror -Wshadow -Wpointer-arith -Wcast-qual -Wformat=2 -Wno-unqualified-std-cast-call -g -fno-sanitize-recover=all -fsanitize=undefined -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/router_same_network_sanitized.dir/router_same_network.cc.o -o router_same_network_sanitized  libcomp_net_testing_sanitized.a ../src/libcomp_net_sanitized.a ../util/libutil_sanitized.a
